equals(Object) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.db.model.AppUser
 
equals(Object) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.db.model.Referendum
 
errorLabel - Variable in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.RegionSelectController
 
evaluate(Referendum) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.services.ReferendumService
Evaluates the outcome of the given referendum and saves the result to the database
evaluate(T, List<ReferendumForm>) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators.AbstractReferendumEvaluator
Function to evaluates the outcome of a referendum based on collected referendum forms This method follows the template method pattern, providing a skeletal implementation that defines the algorithm for evaluating the referendum and delegates the specific steps to concrete subclasses by calling abstract methods
evaluate(T, List<ReferendumForm>) - Method in interface com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators.ReferendumEvaluator
Evaluates the outcome of the given referendum based on collected referendum forms
EvaluateAspect - Class in com.oop.referendumserver.services
Aspect class responsible for intercepting the evaluation of referendums and triggering the notification of observers upon successful evaluation
EvaluateAspect() - Constructor for class com.oop.referendumserver.services.EvaluateAspect
 
expectedParticipationLabel - Variable in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.ReferendumCreateController
 
expectedParticipationSlider - Variable in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.ReferendumCreateController
